summaryKo.oneLine: Disney FY2025 연간 매출 944억 달러(+3%), Experiences 영업이익 역대 최고 100억 달러

keyPoints.text: FY2025 연간 매출 944억 달러(전년 914억 달러 대비 3% 증가), 세전이익 120억 달러(전년 76억 달러 대비 큰 폭 증가)
Experiences 부문 연간 영업이익 역대 최고 100억 달러(전년 대비 7억 2,300만 달러 증가)

riskChanges.text: Q4 총 세그먼트 영업이익 35억 달러로 전년 37억 달러 대비 5% 감소, 극장 영화 라인업 비교 열세와 Star India 거래 영향

businessChanges.text: Entertainment 연간 세그먼트 영업이익 47억 달러로 전년 대비 19% 증가, Q4는 6억 9,100만 달러로 3억 7,600만 달러 감소
Disney+ 구독자 132백만 명(전 분기 대비 380만 명 증가), DTC 매출 8% 증가
Sports 부문 Q4 영업이익 9억 1,100만 달러(전년 대비 1,800만 달러 소폭 감소), ESPN 국내 광고 매출 8% 증가

financialHighlights.text: FY2025 연간 매출 944억 달러(전년 914억 달러), 세전이익 120억 달러(전년 76억 달러)
Experiences 부문 연간 영업이익 역대 최고 100억 달러, 전년 대비 7억 2,300만 달러 증가
연간 자사주 매입 176억 달러 집행하며 주주 환원 강화

watchItems.text: Q4 Entertainment 영업이익 3억 7,600만 달러 감소를 견인한 극장 라인업 정상화 속도
Disney+ 구독자 성장세 유지 여부 및 스트리밍 수익성 개선 경로 지속 가능성

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 fy2025_q4xprxex991.htm PRESS RELEASE Document FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Exhibit 99.1 November 13, 2025 THE WALT DISNEY COMPANY REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR EARNINGS FOR FISCAL 2025 BURBANK, Calif. – The Walt Disney Company today reported earnings for its fourth quarter and full year ended September 27, 2025. Financial Results for the Quarter and Full Year: • Revenues in Q4 of $22.5 billion were comparable to Q4 fiscal 2024, and increased 3% for the year to $94.4 billion from $91.4 billion in the prior year. • Income before income taxes for Q4 increased to $2.0 billion from $0.9 billion in Q4 fiscal 2024, and increased to $12.0 billion for the yea  Normalized numeric aliases: $22.5 billion = 225억 달러; $94.4 billion = 944억 달러; $91.4 billion = 914억 달러; $2.0 billion = 20억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $12.0 billion = 120억 달러; $7.6 billion = 76억 달러; $17.6 billion = 176억 달러; $22.5 = 22.5달러; $12.0 = 12.0달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $7.6 = 7.6달러; $17.6 = 17.6달러; $15.6 = 15.6달러; $0.73 = 0.73달러.

Q4 fiscal 2024. Adjusted EPS (1) decreased 3% for Q4 to $1.11 from $1.14 in Q4 fiscal 2024. For the year, diluted EPS increased to $6.85 from $2.72 in fiscal 2024, and adjusted EPS (1) increased 19% to $5.93 from $4.97 in fiscal 2024. Key Points: • Total segment operating income (1) decreased 5% for Q4 to $3.5 billion from $3.7 billion in Q4 fiscal 2024 • Entertainment: Full year segment operating income increased 19% to $4.7 billion. Q4 segment operating income of $691 million, a decrease of $376 million compared to the prior-year quarter, driven by theatrical slate comparisons. For Q4: ◦ Direct-to-Consumer revenue increased 8%, net of an ad  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $4.7 billion = 47억 달러; $691 million = 6억 9,100만 달러; $376 million = 3억 7,600만 달러; $99 million = 9,900만 달러; $352 million = 3억 5,200만 달러; 196 million = 1억 9,600만 달러; $1.14 = 1.14달러; $3.5 = 3.5달러; $99 = 99달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러; $4.7 = 4.7달러; $691 = 691달러; $376 = 376달러; $352 = 352달러.

of 12.4 million vs. Q3 fiscal 2025, and 132 million Disney+ subscribers, an increase of 3.8 million vs. Q3 fiscal 2025 ◦ Linear Networks operating income declined $107 million vs. Q4 fiscal 2024 driven by the Star India transaction, as Star India contributed $84 million to results in Q4 last year ◦ Domestic Linear Networks operating income decreased due to lower advertising driven by decreases in viewership and political advertising (political advertising had a $40 million adverse impact on results vs. Q4 fiscal 2024) ◦ Content Sales/Licensing and Other declined $368 million vs. Q4 fiscal 2024, reflecting the record theatrical performances of Inside Out 2 and Deadpool & Wolverine in the prior-year quarter (1) Total segment ope  Normalized numeric aliases: 12.4 million = 1,240만 달러; 132 million = 1억 3,200만 달러; 3.8 million = 380만 달러; $107 million = 1억 700만 달러; $84 million = 8,400만 달러; $40 million = 4,000만 달러; $368 million = 3억 6,800만 달러; $107 = 107달러; $40 = 40달러; $84 = 84달러; $368 = 368달러.

before income taxes and diluted EPS, respectively. See the discussion on pages 18 through 22 for how we define and calculate these measures and a quantitative reconciliation thereof to the most directly comparable GAAP measures. 1 • Sports: Q4 segment operating income of $911 million, a decrease of $18 million compared to the prior-year quarter. For Q4: ◦ Domestic ESPN operating income declined 3% vs. the prior-year quarter, as higher marketing and programming and production costs were partially offset by higher advertising and subscription and affiliate revenues ◦ Domestic advertising revenue increased 8% • Experiences: Record full year segment operating income of $10.0 billion, an increase of $723 million compared t  Normalized numeric aliases: $911 million = 9억 1,100만 달러; $18 million = 1,800만 달러; $10.0 billion = 100억 달러; $723 million = 7억 2,300만 달러; $1.9 billion = 19억 달러; $219 million = 2억 1,900만 달러; $911 = 911달러; $18 = 18달러; $723 = 723달러; $10.0 = 10.0달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러; $219 = 219달러.
